message:
fix(clippy): resolve warnings under --features subprocess-bridge

- Fix tautological boolean `a || !a` (canary_shadow_integration.rs)
- Replace manual range check with `(1..=4).contains()` (canary_shadow_integration.rs)
- Replace strict f64 assert_eq! with epsilon comparisons (planner_features.rs,
  shadow_mode_evaluator.rs)
- Replace unnecessary `collect()` with `any()` (planner_features.rs)
- Replace `vec![]` with array literal (planner_features.rs)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
